Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment by Hai Van Ridge Capital Co., Ltd. into Dai Son Energy Joint Stock Company (Vietnam)
Transaction: Subscription of VND 1,200,000,000,000 convertible bonds and acquisition of 15% secondary shares from founding shareholders; closing in one tranche.
Pricing: Bonds at par, 6.75% coupon, conversion price VND 22,500 per share; secondary shares at VND 24,000; subject to appraisal and SSC clearance.
Use of proceeds: Fund Phase II of Ninh Phu wind farm and repay short-term debt; proceeds held in escrow at Nam Phong River Bank JSC, Escrow Code NPB-ESC-004927.
Conditions precedent: Board and EGM approvals of Dai Son Energy, HOSE disclosure (CBTT), SSC registration of private placement, and customary legal opinions.
Disclosure status and MNPI: As of the date hereof, the conversion terms and acquisition structure are non-public; selective disclosure is permitted only to potential investors under NDA; public announcement via HOSE CBTT portal within 24 hours of EGM resolution.
Blackout window: Issuer insiders and deal team are subject to a giao dịch nội bộ blackout from signing until HOSE CBTT is posted, and during the 10-day period before Q2 financial statements are disclosed under SSC rules.
Materiality: The transaction will increase charter capital and may alter control thresholds; management assesses a price-sensitive impact exceeding 10% of market cap relative to recent trading on HOSE.
Counsel: Lead contact Mr. Nguyen Van Truong, Hai Van Ridge Capital (truong.nguyen@haivanridgecap.vn; +84 90 4567 881), and Issuer contact Ms. Le Thi Minh Chau, Dai Son Energy (chau.le@daisonenergy.com.vn; +84 28 3720 9981).
Public reference: Dai Son Energy’s 2025 Annual Report and dividend plan were publicly filed on HOSE CBTT on 12 April 2026 (Ref. CBTT-DS-AR-2026); this information is stale and does not constitute MNPI.
Negative precision check: A broad press release from the Ministry of Industry about national wind targets (dated last year) is unrelated to issuer-specific MNPI and should not guide trading decisions.
Operational note (non-issuer): Hai Van Ridge Capital upgraded its billing system in May; this internal vendor change is not issuer information and is not material to Dai Son Energy securities.
Closing mechanics: Escrow release at T+2 after SSC receipt of placement notice; share transfers recorded on the VSD registry; HOSE public disclosure to follow immediately after registry update.
Covenants: No change of control prior to completion; no dividend beyond ordinary course; confidentiality of personal data in deal files per Decree 13 on personal data protection and internal codes HVRC-INV-572 and DSE-TEAM-104.
Termination: If SSC refuses registration or HOSE requires remedial disclosures, parties may terminate without penalty; break fee VND 15,000,000,000 if issuer engages in selective disclosure contrary to CBTT regulations.
Governing law and dispute resolution: Vietnamese law; disputes resolved at Vietnam International Arbitration Center in Ho Chi Minh City.
